name: xsquared
description: OpenClaw plugin for drafting, reviewing, and publishing high-quality X posts with Birdclaw.

interface.shortDescription: Generate and publish X content from trends and topics.
interface.longDescription: xsquared gives OpenClaw a repeatable workflow for analyzing X context with Birdclaw, generating post candidates, tracking drafts in a local dashboard, rewriting drafts on request, and publishing approved posts through Birdclaw.
defaultPrompt: Generate X posts about AI agents.
